/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/tests/test_compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/lexer/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/semantic/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/codegen/codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/diagnostics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/utf8.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/i18n.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/semver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/sandbox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/security.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/stdlib_registry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/stdlib_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/medium_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/complex_catalog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/formatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/pkg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/debug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/debug_meta.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/js_codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/utils/educational.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/repl/repl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/serve/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang_tests.dir/src/lsp/server.cpp.o -o afrilang_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
